info.title: KomKits Public API
info.description: Read-only public gateway covering 18 commerce domains (orders, invoices, quotations, payments, items, parties, sales returns, and lookup/reference data). Every endpoint is authenticated with an API key and is provisioned/managed from the KomKits dashboard Developer Console.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Sales orders. Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Sales invoices. Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Quotations
tags.description: Sales quotations. Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Incoming payments
tags.description: Incoming payments (receipts). Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Outgoing payments
tags.description: Outgoing payments (vendor/expense payments). Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Generic payment ledger entries (direction-agnostic). Resolved as core-depth alongside paymentIn/paymentOut since it is structurally and semantically identical (a financial-transaction domain) — not explicitly named in either D-06 depth list.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: Catalog items (products/services). Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Parties
tags.description: Customers, vendors, and other business parties. Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Sales returns
tags.description: Sales returns. Core commerce domain — full request/response examples.

tags.name: Brands
tags.description: Product brands. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Product categories. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Sales channels
tags.description: Sales channels. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Countries
tags.description: Country reference data. Filter-only by design — states/cities sub-resources are intentionally excluded from the public gateway allow-list. No by-id GET exists for this domain.

tags.name: Manufacturers
tags.description: Item manufacturers. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Item prices
tags.description: Per-channel item pricing. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Item stock
tags.description: Per-location item stock levels. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Locations
tags.description: Warehouse/store locations. Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

tags.name: Payment accounts
tags.description: Payment accounts (bank/cash/card). Lookup domain — schema-only plus one response example.

bearerAuth.description: Present your API key as `Authorization: Bearer kk_live_...`. Keys are created and revoked from the KomKits dashboard Developer Console. req.businessCode is resolved exclusively from the key — never from headers, query params, or body fields.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Exact copy transcribed from publicApiAuth.js for auth failures.

data.description: Response payload. A single resource object for by-id lookups, or an array of resource objects for filter/list operations.

Unauthorized401.description: Missing, malformed, unknown, or wrong-hash API key. Exact copy from publicApiAuth.js: "Missing or malformed Authorization header. Expected: Bearer <api-key>", "Malformed API key", or "Invalid API key" (same message for unknown key and wrong hash — no enumeration oracle).

value.error: Missing or malformed Authorization header. Expected: Bearer <api-key>

NotFound404.description: Resource not found for the given id.

post.description: Fired when a new invoice is created. Payload shape is identical for every event in the catalogue — only `event` and `reference_*` fields vary.
Fired when a new sales order is created.
Fired when a payment (in or out) is recorded.
Fired when a new sales return is created.
